Hero.title: Zana zote za PDF katika sehemu moja
Hero.subtitle: Zana zote unazohitaji kwa ajili ya kutumia PDF, ziko karibu nawe. Zote ni 100% BURE, salama na rahisi kutumia.

merge-pdf.name: Changanya PDF
merge-pdf.description: Changanya nyaraka nyingi za PDF kuwa moja.

split-pdf.name: Gawanya PDF
split-pdf.description: Gawanya PDF kuwa nyaraka nyingi au toa kurasa.

remove-pages.name: Ondoa Kurasa
remove-pages.description: Ondoa kurasa zisizohitajika kutoka kwa PDF yako.

extract-pages.name: Toa Kurasa
extract-pages.description: Toa kurasa mahususi ili kuunda PDF mpya.

organize-pdf.name: Panga PDF
organize-pdf.description: Panga na mpangilio kurasa za PDF yako.

compress-pdf.name: Nyongeza PDF
compress-pdf.description: Punguza saizi ya faili za PDF bila kupoteza ubora.

repair-pdf.name: Tengeneza PDF
repair-pdf.description: Tengeneza faili ya PDF iliyoharibika au iliyofeliwa.

flatten-pdf.name: Nyooka PDF
flatten-pdf.description: Nyooka fomu na maelezo ya PDF yako.

pdf-to-word.name: PDF hadi Word
pdf-to-word.description: Badilisha PDF kuwa hati za Word zinazoweza kuhaririwa.

pdf-to-excel.name: PDF hadi Excel
pdf-to-excel.description: Badilisha jedwali la PDF kuwa jedwali la Excel.

pdf-to-ppt.name: PDF hadi PowerPoint
pdf-to-ppt.description: Badilisha PDF kuwa wasilisho wa PowerPoint.

pdf-to-jpg.name: PDF hadi JPG
pdf-to-jpg.description: Badilisha kila ukurasa wa PDF kuwa picha ya JPG.

pdf-to-png.name: PDF hadi PNG
pdf-to-png.description: Badilisha kurasa za PDF kuwa picha za PNG za ubora wa hali ya juu.

pdf-to-html.name: PDF hadi HTML
pdf-to-html.description: Badilisha PDF kuwa ukurasa wa HTML.

pdf-to-pdfa.name: PDF hadi PDF/A
pdf-to-pdfa.description: Badilisha PDF kuwa fomu ya PDF/A kwa ajili ya uhifadhi wa muda mrefu.

word-to-pdf.name: Word hadi PDF
word-to-pdf.description: Badilisha hati za Word kuwa PDF.

excel-to-pdf.name: Excel hadi PDF
excel-to-pdf.description: Badilisha jedwali la Excel kuwa PDF.

ppt-to-pdf.name: PowerPoint hadi PDF
ppt-to-pdf.description: Badilisha wasilisho wa PowerPoint kuwa PDF.

jpg-to-pdf.name: JPG hadi PDF
jpg-to-pdf.description: Changanya picha za JPG kuwa hati ya PDF.

png-to-pdf.name: PNG hadi PDF
png-to-pdf.description: Badilisha picha za PNG kuwa faili ya PDF.

html-to-pdf.name: HTML hadi PDF
html-to-pdf.description: Badilisha ukurasa wa HTML kuwa hati ya PDF.

edit-pdf.name: Hariri PDF
edit-pdf.description: Ongeza maandishi, picha na umbo kwenye PDF yako.

add-page-numbers.name: Ongeza Nambari za Kurasa
add-page-numbers.description: Ongeza nambari za kurasa kwenye hati ya PDF yako.

add-watermark.name: Ongeza Filigrani
add-watermark.description: Ongeza filigrani ya maandishi au picha kwenye PDF yako.

sign-pdf.name: Saini PDF
sign-pdf.description: Saini hati za PDF yako kwa njia ya kielektroniki.

redact-pdf.name: Ficha PDF
redact-pdf.description: Ficha taarifa nyeti kwenye PDF yako.

crop-pdf.name: Kata PDF
crop-pdf.description: Kata kingo na kata kurasa za PDF yako.

protect-pdf.name: Linda PDF
protect-pdf.description: Ongeza neno la siri ili kulinda PDF yako.

unlock-pdf.name: Fungua PDF
unlock-pdf.description: Ondoa neno la siri la hati ya PDF iliyolindwa.

compare-pdf.name: Linganisha PDF
compare-pdf.description: Linganisha faili mbili za PDF na tambua tofauti.

ai-pdf-summary.name: Maelezo ya AI
ai-pdf-summary.description: Pata muhtasari wa busara wa hati yako ya PDF.

ai-pdf-chat.name: Chat na PDF
ai-pdf-chat.description: Uliza maswali kwa PDF yako kwa kutumia akili bandia.

ai-pdf-translate.name: Tafsiri PDF
ai-pdf-translate.description: Tafsiri hati yako ya PDF kwa lugha nyingine kwa kutumia akili bandia.

edit-metadata.name: Hariri Metadata
edit-metadata.description: Badilisha kichwa, mwandishi na metadata nyingine za PDF yako.

pdf-info.name: Maelezo ya PDF
pdf-info.description: Onyesha maelezo yote ya kiufundi ya faili yako ya PDF.

add-stamp.name: Ongeza Tambo
add-stamp.description: Ongeza tambo la maandishi au picha kwenye kurasa za PDF yako.

add-attachments.name: Piizi za PDF
add-attachments.description: Changanya faili kama piizi kwenye hati yako ya PDF.

extract-images.name: Toa Picha
extract-images.description: Toa picha zote zilizowekwa kwenye hati yako ya PDF.

remove-images.name: Ondoa Picha
remove-images.description: Ondoa picha zote kutoka kwa PDF yako ili kupunguza saizi yake.

multi-page-layout.name: Mpangilio wa Kurasa Nyingi
multi-page-layout.description: Panga kurasa 2, 4, 6 au 9 za PDF kwenye karatasi moja.

overlay-pdf.name: Piga Chapa kwenye PDF
overlay-pdf.description: Piga chapa kwenye PDF moja juu ya nyingine (msingi wa ukurasa, kichwa, saini).

sanitize-pdf.name: Safisha PDF
sanitize-pdf.description: Ondoa JavaScript, viungo na metadata nyeti kutoka kwa PDF yako.

remove-blanks.name: Ondoa Kurasa Zilizowekwa
remove-blanks.description: Gundua na ondoa kurasa tupu za PDF yako kiotomatiki.

Home.security_desc: Faili zako haziondoki kamwe kifaa chako. Utunzaji hufanyika ndani ya kifaa chako kwenye kivinjari.
Home.speed_desc: Bila kuweka faili kwenye seva, utunzaji ni wa haraka na hautegeezi na uunganisho wako wa intaneti.
Home.no_signup_desc: Anza mara moja. Hakuna haja ya kuunda akaunti au kutoa anwani yako ya barua pepe ili kutumia zana.
